---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-10"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
# Load the data
load("obesity.Rda")

obesity <- obesity |>
  mutate(diabetes = ifelse(diabetes == "No", 0, 1))

as.numeric(obesity$diabetes)
```

```{r}
lin_model <- lm(diabetes ~ medhyper*waist + medhyper*sex + medhyper*SYSBP 
                + medhyper*DIABP +  medhyper*alcohol + medhyper*current.smoking,
                data = obesity)

summary(lin_model)
```
